_meta.name: E1/E2/E3 ckpt backup infrastructure landed
_meta.blocks: ALM A1 (14B r4 base resume + Φ-aware LoRA)

E1.summary: rclone wrapper auto-backup hook (post-save) — pure hexa, idempotent

E2.summary: Ckpt labeling policy (production | experiment | archive) — required arg + retention rules
evidence: label.r2_upload routing verified: experiment=false, production=true, archive=true
retention_days encoded: production=-1 (permanent), experiment=0 (pod_lifetime), archive=30 (cold rotation eligible)

E3.summary: Naming convention enforcement (alm14b-phi-r{N}-s{S}, no v\d+) + linter
evidence: scripts/ckpt_name_lint.hexa parses + runs against current ckpt state
hook reuses validate_basename() to warn at backup time
20 dirs scanned baseline — 15 ERROR + 12 WARN captured (all legacy v\d+ pre-policy)

naming_lint_v_digit_test.warning_emitted: ERROR: forbidden pattern v\d+ (feedback_no_version_in_filename) at offset 7
naming_lint_v_digit_test.verdict: PASS — hook detects v\d+ at backup time, lint baseline catches at scan time

baseline_lint_violations.interpretation: All 15 ERRORs are pre-existing legacy ckpts written before E3 policy adoption. Per task spec, this is the BASELINE — not a bug. Future ckpts must use new naming convention (alm14b-phi-r{N}-s{S}).

changes: Sidecar emission upgraded: ckpt_meta.json (canonical) with {model_tag, round, step, label, phi_holo, ce_loss, wall_clock_minutes, git_sha, host}
Legacy alias train_meta.json still written for backward compat with existing tooling
Hook resolution: HEXA_CKPT_HOOK env wins, else ANIMA_ROOT/scripts/ckpt_backup_hook.hexa

guardrails_observed.hexa_first: PASS — zero new .py/.rs/.sh; hook + linter + policy all .hexa or .json
guardrails_observed.no_l0_touch: PASS — only modified training/train_alm_14b.hexa (R2 protected, not L0); created scripts/ + shared/config/ + shared/state/
guardrails_observed.no_credentials: PASS — rclone reads ~/.config/rclone/rclone.conf; hook never inlines credentials
guardrails_observed.no_real_upload: PASS — only dry-run executed against /tmp/fake_ckpt/, no R2 traffic
guardrails_observed.worktree_isolation: PASS — work in /Users/ghost/Dev/anima/.claude/worktrees/agent-ad951cde, shared/* writes go to /Users/ghost/Dev/nexus/shared (canonical SSOT)

verdict: PASS — E1/E2/E3 ckpt backup infrastructure landed. ALM A1 (14B r4 resume + Φ-aware LoRA) is unblocked on the backup-policy axis. Hook is idempotent + partial-safe + label-aware; linter captures baseline; trainer wired to invoke hook on every save.
